name: Slow-Cooked Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) tomatoes with liquid, cut up
2 large green peppers, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 3-inch by 1-inch strips.
2. Brown the beef in oil in a skillet.
3. Transfer to a slow cooker.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients; pour over beef.
5. Cover and cook on low for 5-6 hours or until meat is tender.
6. Add tomatoes and green peppers; cook on low for 1 hour longer.
7. Mix cold water and cornstarch to form a paste.
8. Stir into liquid in slow cooker and cook on high until thickened.
9. Serve over noodles or rice.
